title: Spiideo Launches AI Highlights for Automated Highlight and Clip Creation
description: Spiideo has announced the launch of AI Highlights inside Spiideo Play, its automated sports production platform. AI Highlights combines video, event data, audio commentary, and contextual understanding to generate highlight [...]

title: Arm shares slide on smartphone market weakness, AI chip supply concerns
description: May 7 : Arm shares tumbled on Thursday after the company warned of smartphone market softness and challenges in securing supply for its new artificial intelligence chip to meet growing demand.The stock fell 5 per cent to $225.43, with the drop set to erase more than $12 billion from the company's market valua

title: Innefu Labs Empanelled by National e-Governance Division (NeGD) to Accelerate AI Adoption Across Government Departments
description: New Delhi, India — May 07, 2026: Innefu Labs, an AI-driven company providing cutting edge Data Analytics and Information Security The post Innefu Labs Empanelled by National e-Governance Division (NeGD) to Accelerate AI Adoption Across Government Departments appeared first on Mumbai Times .
